title: Student can log in and reach student dashboard
description: Verifies a SISWA user can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the student dashboard.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email input field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password input field
Click the login button to submit

title: Admin can log in and reach admin dashboard
description: Verifies an ADMIN user can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email input field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password input field
Click the login button to submit

title: Successful student registration redirects to login
description: Verifies a new student can register with valid profile details and is redirected to the login page with a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Type "Test Student" into the full name field
Type "P@ssw0rd123!" into the confirm password field
Click the register button to submit

title: Registration fails when confirm password does not match
description: Verifies the form shows a validation error when password and confirm password do not match.

steps.description: Type "Mismatch Password" into the full name field
Type "DifferentP@ssw0rd123!" into the confirm password field
Click the register button to submit
Verify text "passwords do not match" is visible

title: Required field validation when submitting empty form
description: Verifies the registration form shows required-field validation messages when submitted with no inputs.

steps.description: Click the register button to submit
Verify text "Full name is required" is visible
Verify text "Email is required" is visible
Verify text "Class is required" is visible
Verify text "Major is required" is visible
Verify text "Password is required" is visible

title: Invalid email format is rejected
description: Verifies the email field validation rejects an improperly formatted email address.

steps.description: Type "Invalid Email" into the full name field
Type "P@ssw0rd123!" into the confirm password field
Click the register button to submit

title: Password visibility toggle does not clear password input
description: Verifies toggling password visibility keeps the entered password intact and allows successful submission when other fields are valid.

steps.description: Type "Toggle Test" into the full name field
Type "P@ssw0rd123!" into the confirm password field
Click the register button to submit

title: Dropdowns load and allow selection for class and major
description: Verifies the class and major dropdowns are present, can be opened, and a selection is reflected for both.

title: Forgot Password - request reset with registered email shows success confirmation
description: Verifies that submitting a registered email on Forgot Password shows a visible success message indicating a reset email was sent.

steps.description: Verify text indicating a reset email was sent is visible
Verify the email field is visible

title: Forgot Password - unknown email shows email-not-found error
description: Verifies that submitting an unregistered email displays a visible error message (email not found).

steps.description: Verify text indicating the email was not found is visible

title: Forgot Password - submitting with empty email shows validation message
description: Verifies that the form blocks submission and shows a visible validation message when email is empty.

steps.description: Verify text indicating the email is required is visible
Verify the email field is visible

title: Forgot Password - invalid email format shows validation error
description: Verifies that entering a malformed email shows a visible invalid email validation message.

steps.description: Verify text indicating a valid email is required is visible

title: Forgot Password - trimming behavior for email with leading/trailing spaces
description: Verifies that an email with leading/trailing spaces can still be submitted and results in a success confirmation for a registered email.

steps.description: Verify text indicating a reset email was sent is visible

title: Forgot Password - resubmitting after an error works after correcting email
description: Verifies that after an email-not-found error, changing to a registered email and submitting shows a success message.

steps.description: Verify text indicating the email was not found is visible
Verify text indicating a reset email was sent is visible

title: Forgot Password - page loads with expected primary controls visible
description: Verifies the Forgot Password page renders the email field and submit button so the user can request a reset.

title: Validation: mismatched confirm password blocks submission
description: Verifies the form shows a visible validation error when password and confirm password do not match.

steps.description: Type "DifferentPassword#123" into the confirm password field
Verify text "Passwords do not match" is visible

title: Validation: required fields show errors when submitting empty form
description: Verifies required-field validation appears when submitting without entering a password.

steps.description: Verify text "Password is required" is visible

title: Password policy: too-short password shows visible error
description: Verifies the UI enforces password policy by rejecting an obviously too-short password.

steps.description: Type "123" into the confirm password field
Verify text "Password must be" is visible

title: Student dashboard loads and shows statistics and recommendations
description: Verifies an authenticated student can open the dashboard and see stats and recommended books.

steps.description: Verify element "Dashboard statistics section" is visible
Verify element "Recommended books list" is visible

title: Open a recommended book from dashboard to reach the book detail page
description: Verifies a student can click a recommended book card from the dashboard and land on the book detail page.

steps.description: Click the first recommended book card

title: Quick navigation from dashboard to Catalog page
description: Verifies a student can use dashboard navigation to reach the catalog page.

title: Quick navigation from dashboard to Loans page
description: Verifies a student can use dashboard navigation to reach the loans management page.

title: Dashboard layout essentials are visible (header and sidebar)
description: Verifies the student dashboard renders core layout elements used for navigation and identity.

steps.description: Verify element "Dashboard main content" is visible

title: Dashboard handles empty recommendations state gracefully
description: Verifies the dashboard shows a clear, user-friendly message when no recommendations are available.

steps.description: Verify element "Recommended books list" is visible
Verify text "Tidak ada rekomendasi" is visible

title: Dashboard statistics section shows readable values
description: Verifies the dashboard stats area presents human-readable numbers/labels rather than placeholders or blank content.

steps.description: Verify element "Dashboard statistics section" is visible

title: Search books by title and open a book detail from catalog
description: Verifies a student can search by title in the catalog and open a book detail page from the results.

steps.description: Click on "Katalog" in the student navigation
Verify element "Book results list" is visible
Click on the first visible book card

title: Filter catalog by category and verify results update
description: Verifies a student can filter the catalog by category and see the catalog update accordingly.

steps.description: Click on "Katalog" in the student navigation
Verify element "Book results list" is visible

title: Use pagination to browse additional pages in the catalog
description: Verifies a student can move to the next page of the catalog using pagination controls.

steps.description: Click on "Katalog" in the student navigation
Verify element "Book results list" is visible

title: Search with no matching results shows 'no books found' state
description: Verifies the catalog shows a clear empty state when a search query returns no matches.

steps.description: Click on "Katalog" in the student navigation
Verify text "no books found" is visible

title: Combine category filter then search within that category
description: Verifies the catalog supports using category filtering and title search together without breaking results rendering.

steps.description: Click on "Katalog" in the student navigation
Verify element "Book results list" is visible

title: Changing category after a no-results search updates the empty state
description: Verifies that switching category while in a no-results state updates the UI and does not remain stuck.

steps.description: Click on "Katalog" in the student navigation
Verify text "no books found" is visible
Verify element "Book results list" is visible

title: Open book detail from a filtered or paginated view
description: Verifies a student can open a book detail page even after changing the catalog view via filter or pagination.

steps.description: Click on "Katalog" in the student navigation
Click on the first visible book card

title: Borrow request from book detail shows pending confirmation
description: Verifies a student can open a book detail from the catalog and submit a borrow request, then sees a confirmation indicating the request was created.

steps.description: Click on "Katalog" in the student navigation menu
Click on a book card in the catalog list
Click the "Submit a borrow request" button

title: Book detail page shows key book information
description: Verifies that opening a book from the catalog displays the book detail page with visible book information content.

steps.description: Click on "Katalog" in the student navigation menu
Click on a book card in the catalog list

title: Read reviews and ratings on book detail
description: Verifies that a student can view the reviews section on the book detail page and see rating/review content area.

steps.description: Click on "Katalog" in the student navigation menu
Click on a book card in the catalog list

title: Add to favorites from book detail and see it in Favorites list
description: Verifies that a student can add a book to favorites from the detail page and then see it listed in the Favorites page.

steps.description: Click on "Katalog" in the student navigation menu
Click on a book card in the catalog list
Click on "Favorit" in the student navigation menu

title: Unavailable book: submitting borrow request shows error message
description: Verifies that attempting to borrow a book with zero available stock shows an unavailable error message instead of creating a loan.

steps.description: Click on "Katalog" in the student navigation menu
Click on a book card that shows "0" available or otherwise indicates out of stock
Click the "Submit a borrow request" button

title: Write and submit a review from book detail
description: Verifies that a student can open the review form on a book detail page, submit a review, and see a visible confirmation or the new review appearing.

steps.description: Click on "Katalog" in the student navigation menu
Click on a book card in the catalog list
Type "Great read for class." into the review text field

title: Borrow request confirmation can be validated in Loans page
description: Verifies that after requesting a borrow, the student can navigate to the Loans page and see an entry indicating the loan exists and is pending.

steps.description: Click on "Katalog" in the student navigation menu
Click on a book card in the catalog list
Click the "Submit a borrow request" button
Click on "Peminjaman" in the student navigation menu

title: Request return from a loan detail page updates status to RETURNING
description: Verifies a student can open a loan, request a return, and see the loan status update to RETURNING.

steps.description: Click on the first loan item in the loans list

title: Request return from loan detail shows status RETURNING on the detail view
description: Verifies the loan detail view reflects the updated RETURNING status after submitting a return request.

steps.description: Click on the first loan item in the loans list

title: Filter loans by status shows only matching loans
description: Verifies filtering by a specific status updates the list to only show loans matching that status.

steps.description: Select "ACTIVE" from the status filter dropdown

title: Filter loans by RETURNING status shows RETURNING loans
description: Verifies filtering to RETURNING updates the list accordingly and shows RETURNING status items.

steps.description: Select "RETURNING" from the status filter dropdown

title: View loan details from loans list
description: Verifies a student can open a loan from the list and see a loan detail view with identifying information.

steps.description: Click on the first loan item in the loans list

title: Filtering to a status with no results shows an empty state
description: Verifies that when a selected status filter has no matching loans, an empty state message is displayed.

steps.description: Select "REJECTED" from the status filter dropdown
Verify text "No loans found" is visible

title: Favorites page remains usable after refresh-like re-entry via menu navigation
description: Verifies the favorites page can be re-opened via in-app navigation and still shows consistent UI state.

title: Start a new conversation and confirm it is listed
description: Verifies a student can start a new conversation, send a first message, and see the conversation appear in the list.

steps.description: Click "Pesan" in the student navigation menu
Type "Hi Admin, I would like to ask about library rules." into the message input field
Verify text "Hi Admin, I would like to ask about library rules." is visible
Verify text "Hi Admin, I would like to ask about library rules." is visible in the conversations list

title: Admin can access dashboard and see key metrics
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can load the Admin Dashboard and see core statistics widgets.

title: Admin dashboard shows pending loan requests section/list
description: Verifies the dashboard displays a visible list/section for pending loan requests.

steps.description: Verify element "Pending loan requests list" is visible

title: Admin can open a pending loan request from the dashboard
description: Verifies clicking a pending loan item navigates to a detail/inspection view or shows visible details.

steps.description: Click the first item in the "Pending loan requests" list

title: Admin dashboard shows overdue items section
description: Verifies the dashboard contains an overdue books/items section that is visible to admins.

title: Admin dashboard layout includes sidebar navigation to Admin Buku page
description: Verifies the admin sidebar is present and can navigate to the book management page via click (not direct URL navigation).

title: Admin dashboard layout includes sidebar navigation to Admin Peminjaman page
description: Verifies the admin can navigate from the dashboard to loan management using the sidebar menu.

title: Create a new book and verify it appears in the book list
description: Verifies an admin can add a new book via the Add Book form and see it listed afterward.

steps.description: Click the "Buku" menu item in the admin navigation
Click "Add" / "Tambah Buku" to add a new book
Fill "E2E Book Title" into the Title / Judul field
Fill "E2E Author" into the Author / Penulis field
Fill "E2E Publisher" into the Publisher / Penerbit field
Fill "2024" into the Year / Tahun field
Fill "3" into the Stock / Stok field
Verify text "E2E Book Title" is visible

title: Add book validation: submit with missing required fields shows errors
description: Verifies required-field validation messages appear when trying to submit an incomplete Add Book form.

steps.description: Click the "Buku" menu item in the admin navigation
Click "Add" / "Tambah Buku" to add a new book

title: Create a new category and verify it appears in the list
description: Verifies an admin can add a new book category and see it in the categories list.

steps.description: Click on the "Add" or "Tambah Kategori" button
Type "Automation Category A" into the category name field
Type "Category created by UI automation" into the details/description field
Verify text "Automation Category A" is visible

title: Cancel category creation and verify no new category is added
description: Verifies cancelling out of the add-category flow does not add a category to the list.

steps.description: Click on the "Add" or "Tambah Kategori" button
Type "Automation Category Cancel" into the category name field
Verify text "Automation Category Cancel" is not visible

title: Validate required field: attempt to save a category with empty name
description: Verifies the category name is required and the UI blocks saving when it is empty.

steps.description: Click on the "Add" or "Tambah Kategori" button
Fill "" into the category name field

title: View members list and search by name/email
description: Verifies an admin can open the member management page, see the members list, and filter it using search.

steps.description: Click "Anggota" in the admin navigation menu
Type "a" into the member search field

title: Edit a member and save changes
description: Verifies an admin can edit an existing member’s details and see the updated info reflected in the list.

steps.description: Click "Anggota" in the admin navigation menu
Type "test" into the member search field
Click the "Edit" button for the first visible member in the list
Fill "QA Updated" into the name field

title: Cancel out of editing a member without saving
description: Verifies an admin can exit the edit member form without saving changes.

steps.description: Click "Anggota" in the admin navigation menu
Click the "Edit" button for the first visible member in the list

title: Edit member validation: required fields prevent saving
description: Verifies the edit member form shows validation and does not save when a required field is empty.

steps.description: Click "Anggota" in the admin navigation menu
Click the "Edit" button for the first visible member in the list

title: Toggle member active status and see status change in list
description: Verifies an admin can toggle a member’s active status and the updated status is reflected in the list.

steps.description: Click "Anggota" in the admin navigation menu
Click the "Toggle active" control for the first visible member in the list

title: Toggle member active status while list is filtered by search
description: Verifies an admin can search for a member and toggle active status within the filtered results.

steps.description: Click "Anggota" in the admin navigation menu
Type "@" into the member search field
Click the "Toggle active" control for the first visible member in the list

title: Delete a member and confirm removal from list
description: Verifies an admin can delete a member, confirm the prompt, and see the member removed from the list.

steps.description: Click "Anggota" in the admin navigation menu
Click the "Delete" button for the first visible member in the list

title: Delete a member and cancel at confirmation
description: Verifies an admin can initiate deletion but cancel, leaving the member in the list.

steps.description: Click "Anggota" in the admin navigation menu
Click the "Delete" button for the first visible member in the list

title: Add a new member successfully
description: Verifies an admin can add a new member and see it appear in the members list.

steps.description: Click "Anggota" in the admin navigation menu
Fill "QA New Member" into the name field

title: Add member validation: prevent duplicate/invalid email
description: Verifies the add member form shows an error when using an invalid or already-used email address.

steps.description: Click "Anggota" in the admin navigation menu
Fill "QA Duplicate" into the name field

title: Approve a pending loan request from Admin Loan Management
description: Verifies an admin can approve a pending loan request and the status updates to APPROVED.

steps.description: Click on the first visible pending loan request in the list

title: Reject a pending loan request with a rejection reason
description: Verifies an admin can reject a pending loan request by providing a reason and the status updates to REJECTED.

steps.description: Click on the first visible pending loan request in the list
Type "Stock needed for class" into the rejection reason field

title: Verify a returned loan and mark it as RETURNED
description: Verifies an admin can verify a return and the loan status updates to RETURNED.

steps.description: Click on the first visible returned loan in the list

title: Attempt to approve a loan already APPROVED and see an invalid action error
description: Verifies the UI prevents approving an already-approved loan and shows an appropriate error message.

steps.description: Click on the first visible approved loan in the list

title: Mark a verified return as damaged during return verification
description: Verifies an admin can mark a book as damaged during the return verification flow and a damage indicator is shown.

steps.description: Click on the first visible returned loan in the list

title: Switch between loan status tabs and verify the list updates
description: Verifies the loan list can be filtered by status tabs and each tab displays corresponding content.

title: Reject flow validation: attempt to reject without providing a reason
description: Verifies the rejection reason is required and the UI shows a validation message when submitted empty.

steps.description: Click on the first visible pending loan request in the list

title: Cancel out of approve action and verify status does not change
description: Verifies an admin can cancel an approval confirmation (if present) and the loan remains in PENDING status.

steps.description: Click on the first visible pending loan request in the list

title: View Admin Reports page and see core report sections
description: Verifies an admin can access the Reports page and see the main report widgets/sections rendered.

steps.description: Click on "Laporan" in the admin navigation menu

title: View loan statistics summary on Admin Reports
description: Verifies the loan statistics summary is visible on the Reports page after login.

steps.description: Click on "Laporan" in the admin navigation menu

title: Filter reports by a valid date range
description: Verifies the report content updates (or at least remains valid) after applying a valid date range filter.

steps.description: Click on "Laporan" in the admin navigation menu
Fill "2026-01-01" into the start date field
Fill "2026-01-31" into the end date field

title: View popular books chart/section
description: Verifies the popular books report visualization/section is visible on the Reports page.

steps.description: Click on "Laporan" in the admin navigation menu
Verify element "Popular books chart" is visible

title: View active members chart/section
description: Verifies the active members report visualization/section is visible on the Reports page.

steps.description: Click on "Laporan" in the admin navigation menu
Verify element "Active members chart" is visible

title: Filter reports with invalid date range (end date before start date)
description: Verifies the UI prevents or warns about an invalid date range when filtering reports.

steps.description: Click on "Laporan" in the admin navigation menu
Fill "2026-02-10" into the start date field
Fill "2026-02-01" into the end date field

title: Clear or reset date filter back to default state
description: Verifies an admin can return from a filtered view to the default reporting view using a reset/clear control.

steps.description: Click on "Laporan" in the admin navigation menu
Fill "2026-01-01" into the start date field
Fill "2026-01-31" into the end date field

title: Reviews list renders and is visible on book detail page
description: Verifies the reviews section is visible on the book detail page and shows existing reviews content when present.

steps.description: Click on "Katalog" in the student navigation
Click on the first visible book in the catalog list to open its detail page
Scroll to the reviews section on the book detail page
